ddt:Target.Name: ESP H79 v4.0
ddt:Target.Description:
Nom base: ESP H79
Application : ESP 4x2 et 4x4 EV1011.31
Catalin Ristea 02/07/2013 Add DTCs 5090 and 5091
Catalin RISTEA +4 021 6868699 Fabien Mériguet - Sce 65630 - Tél 56431
Iulian STOIAN - 16/12/2011 Update for ESP H79 F4R DP2/DP8
Catalin Ristea 15/03/2013 Updated for ESP H79 F4R 4WD BVA and BVM

Item.Text: Valeur en dehors de la plage (13h)
Circuit ouvert ou court-circuit à la masse (14h)
Interférence entre une ou plusieurs roues (4h)
Pb Mécanique ou Magnétique sur la cible (Dh)
No ABS available, no EBD available

Data.Name: Occurence fault counter
Data.Comment: Compteur du nombre d'apparition du défaut

Item.Text: Not authorized to diag other system

Request.Name: Read Freeze Frame
Request.Comment: Lecture du contexte de panne associé au DTC

Request.Name: FillingStatus.Read
Request.Comment: Lecture de l'octet de status du remplissage hydraulique

Request.Name: FillingStatus.Write
Request.Comment: Ecriture de l'octet de status pour le remplissage hydraulique

Screen.Name: 12 - After sate date & VIN & Filling status

Label.Text: This routine is used when you need to control the harness with the voltmeter
When the Wheel speed sensor is disconnected, the ECU stop its supply. So to test it, push on start button and verify if supply equals 12v.
Pressed gaz pedal and reach the engine RPM betwwen 2000 rpm and 3000 rpm. After that, start the torque reduction request (ASR) routine.
1. Engine stopped, if the brake pedal run is large ==> Some air is present in the primary hydraulic braking circuit.
==> DO NOT CHECK the hydraulic circuit BUT make a hydraulic circuit BLEED.
2. To test the hydraulic braking circuit, stop the engine and push three times on the braking pedal.
==> If the braking pedal may still run, then, air is present in the primary hydraulic braking circuit.
==> Else, the braking circuit is OK
A - Push on the braking pedal
B - Another people tries to turn the selected wheel.
C - The first one click on the selected wheel button.
This routine is used to realize an after sale bleeding.
To have a good result, select continuous mode
Launch each procedure phase (in the order) and pump the brake pedal at each second.
Use only a dry hydraulic group !!!
- Move the mark on the wheel for about 1 cm.
B ==> If the first result is less than 47 tones and if the second result is less than 48 tones, then the tone wheel is faulty and must be changed
C ==> If the result is over 48 tones, more than 1 exact turn has been performed; Start over from step 1.
A ==> If the first result is 47 tones,
